404v vin around 
load 27 ohm
100khz fix control 


CH1 vds of low side mos prim x100 isolated
CH4 vgs " " " 
CH2 = inp current 
CH3 = V_ziner diode (Between resistor and Source)

a R-Ziner is used between Vds to clump vds 
R = 990kohm (around 1Mega)
Zinner 10V (bzx 85 10.0v)
Drain Res K-ziner A-ziner source
